{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323042453EE2DA8DD3B639560D77E"}"},"total":8047},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7192571872985826052","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到目前为止，没啥挑剔，要说有也只有一点，剧情还是少了点，无敌文＋后宫文被你玩出了花样，不错的创意，不像别的小说后宫一干一大堆，各种描述，虽然男书友们爱看，但是后宫嘛顾名思义要一个个花时间花剧情去攻陷，加油作者，看好你，对了，人物境界上不要太跨越了，还有后期收徒主角主线任务多一些，天道阁也好在收点杂役，剧情故事线路多了，小说就长了，不为赚那一点点薄银，只为此书走远一点，让读者看的尽兴点"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1674651254,"group_id":"7158006470225693707","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/J4XmmLGRSvgTRT/yvR25iitiiObQt+DmpJLKdNtXvw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4230518068765485","user_name":"温瞳kiss"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4230518068765485","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7158006470225693707","book_info":{"abstract":"（无敌爽文、轻松诙谐、收徒、无刀子、冲师逆徒、多）
【同名短剧改编已上线】
　　陈道玄穿越后获得系统，只要收徒就能无敌。
　　不论是仙帝，还是诸天圣人至尊，在他面前如同蝼蚁，都逃不过秒杀超度扬灰一条龙服务。
　　魔族女帝、仙门圣女、人族剑仙、海族公主、神族公主，皆是他门下亲传弟子。
　　当他回过神来，已经成为了这诸天万界之主，被无尽大世界生灵所膜拜供奉......
　　大弟子：“一切与师尊为敌者，皆斩无赦！”
　　二弟子：“师尊究竟是什么境界？”
　　三弟子：“世人说本剑仙乃世间绝顶，可在师尊面前却不足百万之一！”
　　陈道玄：“有时候太无敌，也是一种烦恼。”
　　《一座天道殿，无敌从收徒开始》《授徒返还，开局收魔族女帝》","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9a7e36d75e7904ffd564f381f23185ef","author":"白日飞升去","author_id":"","book_id":"7158006470225693707","book_name":"我，天道殿主！弟子全是冲师逆徒","book_short_name":"天道殿主","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7158330051904471564","read_count":"67198","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1818180"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"866","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,女帝,无敌,架空,开局,东方玄幻,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7c353dbbb985f6 38d7054cb6e57aed77~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779395093&x-signature=FinbsLn2xUjZYs8CmfkEHZc%2BpI0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1411400872498523","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.4241888e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323042453EE2DA8DD3B639560D77E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":48,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14241,"reply_count":18,"show_pv":116897},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7299888476572812047","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太喜欢三弟子人设了，结局也很完美和陈 玄生了一对龙凤胎，前面的盘古斧的坑也填了作者大大真的很细心，还有很多人说二弟子她姐姐怎么怎么的，其实我觉得把还好，前期人设略有不足毕竟寻常人眼光在长远在没见识过更广阔的天地之前也就那样，在她没认识陈 玄之前并不知其有多强大，玄幻世界本就讲究优胜劣汰追随强者很正常，一开始她对陈 玄也不熟悉才拒绝了收徒的提议，诺她一开始就知晓陈 玄的强大自然会接受拜师，不过有的东西错过便是错过了，这都很正常。大/二/四/五弟子每个都有自己独立的人设，都很生动形象，人皇等其他重要配角的人设描写也很生动，个个都有自己的人设，性格。最后说说主角，有时很有*格，但有时却感觉有点……。（不可细说[奸笑]）但不是无脑，也没有那种扮猪吃虎的戏码，有谋有略就是后面可能是后宫多了吧倒是与弟子间的小互动比较少了。以上全是我自己看后的感想[赶稿中]不喜勿喷勿怪。否则反弹！反弹！反弹！","text_exts":[{"e":325,"s":321,"text":"扮猪吃虎","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%89%AE%E7%8C%AA%E5%90%83%E8%99%8E&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742110939560D77E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227299888476572812047%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227158006470225693707%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%89%AE%E7%8C%AA%E5%90%83%E8%99%8E%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699643246,"group_id":"7158006470225693707","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"尔等，可愿为本帝俯首？","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+YByejX1Wi2NIkfeWwzJWbVYcUFYiU22xSEOYDxCo0N","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3aa2c132a20e4afc83db070b4235ff0a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792053&x-signature=SF5A5liBpZTIrIfKS8V9EVDHZXk%3D","user_id":"1981735926761628","user_name":"茅山坐忘道"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1981735926761628","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_au
